change: Initial skill — battle-tests pr-controller against the e2e sandbox fleet (#8–28), widening run-pr-controller's dev smoke; adds @claude-debug injection, whitelist-add, and a per-PR scenario map.

Free-text arg; arm polling in a visible browser (daemon idle until armed); realistic PRs/comments; manual UI testing; reset-prs.sh; fixed inject-debug unresolved-thread lookup and gh-pr-create URL capture.

Restart now kills orphan workers (pkill worker-guard) + gotcha; dropped stale PRC_POLL_MINUTES=1440 (clamps to [5,60]); added seen/standing-signal + dispatch-logs-on-completion gotchas; argv-capture verify; trimmed haiku note + deduped §5/@claude-debug gotcha + fixed §3 cross-ref.
snag: orphaned workers masquerading as current ate ~30min of e2e debugging
